title: Deeper Caves
description: An expansion of the Caves & Cliffs update
body:
![Frontpage](https://i.imgur.com/x6NicF4_d.webp?maxwidth=1520&fidelity=grand)

# **THIS MOD IS NOT UNDER DEVELOPMENT, IT'S DISCONTINUED**

## 📖  About:
‘Deeper Caves’ Is a vanilla friendly mod about adding more content related to caves, expanding the features added in the “Caves & Cliffs” and adding new ones to improve the atmosphere.

## 📝 Features:
- Exciting new additions to the Lush Caves and Dripstone Caves
- New useful uses for Copper, Amethyst and Glow Squid
- New armor and tool set made of Rose Gold, and ore between Iron and Diamond
- A lot of new building blocks related to Dripstone, Calcite, Tuff, Andesite, Diorite and Granite
- New stone types in the underground

![Preview](https://i.imgur.com/ONfmpwG_d.webp?maxwidth=1520&fidelity=grand)

## 🔎Info:
- ⚙️ For Forge 1.19.2 and 1.20.1 Created with Mcreator
- 📌 Blocks in this mod do not drop if they are mined with custom tools from other mods (Simply Tools  Hammers, Quark Pickarang) due to Mcreator limitations
- ⚠️ It can be included in modpacks, but please add credits :)
- 📋 If you want to support me and have more news about the mod I recommend you follow me on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/itistruly)
